title: lobelia dentata
intro: Lobelia dentata, also known as Indian tobacco or pukeweed, is a plant species belonging to the Lobeliaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Lobelia dentata include relieving respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as reducing pain and inflammation. Lobelia dentata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
